tagline: Late-night taqueria on Cazador Street, Los Angeles.

hero.eyebrow: CAZADOR ST · 5:30PM TO MIDNIGHT · FRI · SAT · SUN
hero.heading: Tacos until midnight.
hero.subheading: A late-night walk-up taqueria at the end of Cazador Street, open Friday, Saturday, and Sunday from five-thirty in the afternoon until midnight. Trompo de pastor, carnitas, bistec, lengua.

about.label: The stand
about.heading: The light at the end of Cazador.
paragraphs: Tacos Cazador is the walk-up at the end of Cazador Street, the kind of stand that lights up Friday night with a trompo, a comal, and a line that wraps around the block by ten.
We do trompo al pastor, slow-cooked carnitas, charred bistec, and the lengua that brings people back from across the city. Hand-pressed tortillas, salsa rojo and salsa verde mixed fresh every night.
Friday, Saturday, and Sunday only. Five-thirty to midnight. Cash or card. The taco run is part of the night.

services.title: Al Pastor
services.description: Pineapple-marinated pork from the trompo, hand-cut to order, cilantro, onion, fresh lime. The signature.

services.title: Carnitas
services.description: Slow-braised pork shoulder, crispy edges, hand-pressed corn tortilla, onion, cilantro, salsa rojo.

services.title: Bistec
services.description: Skirt steak, charred over the comal, salsa verde, lime. Two corn tortillas per taco.

services.title: Lengua
services.description: Slow-cooked beef tongue, tender, onion, cilantro, salsa rojo. The connoisseur's taco.

services.title: Cabeza
services.description: Slow-cooked beef cheek, rich, charred onions, fresh lime. Limited each night.

services.title: Tacos por Cinco
services.description: Five tacos of your choice, agua fresca, beans. The full late-night plate.

reviews.name: Roberto C.
reviews.text: Cazador is the late-night spot in LA. Two years going every Friday at eleven and the line is always worth it. Trompo al pastor, hand-pressed tortillas. Pure midnight gold.

reviews.name: Daniela S.
reviews.text: Walked up on a Saturday at eight and was eating the best lengua of my life by 8:18. The pastor is no joke. The salsa verde is no joke. Coming back next Friday.

reviews.name: Marc D.
reviews.text: Bring my crew here every Saturday night before the bar. Four guys, sixteen tacos, eighty bucks and the night is made. Cazador never misses.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Tacos Cazador, 2923 Cazador St, Los Angeles, CA 90065

seo.title: Tacos Cazador — Late-night taqueria on Cazador Street, Los Angeles
seo.description: A walk-up late-night taqueria on Cazador Street. Trompo al pastor, carnitas, bistec, lengua. Open Friday, Saturday, Sunday from 5:30 PM to midnight.
